round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent effectively integrated regulatory and meta observations to refine the linguistic evidence, moving from general GCC patterns to specific UAE industrial zone characteristics.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent synthesized regulatory and meta evidence regarding infrastructure standards to strengthen the landscape-based conclusion.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent used cross-agent consensus to reinforce the botanical evidence, though the botanical evidence itself was already strong.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent incorporated meta observations about fencing and lighting to support the regulatory analysis of road infrastructure.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent corroborated infrastructure observations with linguistic and regulatory findings to solidify the UAE identification.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge provided a clear, evidence-weighted synthesis. It correctly identified the convergence of all five agents on the UAE and explicitly listed the supporting evidence from each domain (linguistic, landscape, botany, regulatory, meta) to justify the final decision.
